title: Speaking - Part 4
description: The examiner will ask you some questions related to the topic from Part 3. Give your opinions and discuss with your partner.

questions.question: Do you think that starting your own business is a realistic goal for most people, or is it only for a select few?
How has the rise of digital technology changed the way businesses are started and run?

script.text: Do you think that starting your own business is a realistic goal for most people, or is it only for a select few?
How has the rise of digital technology changed the way businesses are started and run?
Thank you. That's the end of the speaking test.
